supply_chain.dependencies: Several key raw materials and components are either single-sourced or sourced from a limited number of suppliers, in particular CdTe, tellurium, products containing tellurium, and substrate glass. China is a major global producer of tellurium and products containing tellurium.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions may affect the procurement of raw materials used in manufacturing process and the distribution of modules. China announced tightened export controls for five key minerals including products containing tellurium. Failure of key suppliers could disrupt supply chain. Concentration risk in China for tellurium supply. Geopolitical tensions affecting raw material access.

regulatory_risks: Modification, reduction, elimination, or expiration of government subsidies, economic incentives, tax incentives, renewable energy targets under the Inflation Reduction Act of 2022
Changes to IRA financial benefits through technical guidance, regulations, amendments, or new presidential administration policies
Antidumping and countervailing duties on imported crystalline silicon PV cells and modules from China, Taiwan, Cambodia, Malaysia, Thailand, and Vietnam
Section 301 tariffs on Chinese imports including 50% on crystalline silicon solar cells and 25% on modules
Additional 10% tariff on all imports from China announced in February 2025
Section 232 tariffs of 25% on imported aluminum and steel articles
India ALMM (Approved List of Models and Manufacturers) requirements and modifications
India import duty tariffs of 20% on solar modules and cells plus additional 20% tax on modules
China export controls on tellurium and products containing tellurium requiring export licenses
RoHS Directive restrictions on use of cadmium and cadmium compounds in electrical equipment in European Union
California Climate Corporate Data Accountability Act and Climate-Related Financial Risk Act requiring climate-related reporting
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive requiring ESG disclosures
Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act banning imports from China's Xinjiang region
FCPA and U.K. Bribery Act compliance requirements
Environmental laws and regulations governing discharge of pollutants, hazardous materials management, and cleanup of contaminated sites
WEEE Directive requirements for recycling of electrical and electronic equipment in EU
Privacy and data security laws including federal, state, and international regulations
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax framework of 15% for companies with global revenues above certain thresholds
SEC subpoenas relating to operations in India, PV module supply agreement with India-based customer, and technology roadmap aspects

sanction_risks: US-China trade tensions including tariffs on solar products and raw materials
China export controls on tellurium affecting supply chain
Forced labor allegations in Chinese solar supply chain
Potential trade embargoes on materials or equipment necessary for manufacturing operations
